title: Waiting For The Drop: Rise of the Superstar DJs
original_title: Waiting For The Drop: Rise of the Superstar DJs
overview: After Paul Oakenfold and Tiësto lift DJs to rock star icons, a new generation wrestles with excesses that threaten to upend a musical movement. Festivals replace raves, EDM "drops" take over, a company goes bankrupt and DJs "press play."
